servinfo.title: Clearance lights, tail lights or license plate lights do not light up

condition.ptxt: Clearance lights, tail lights or license plate lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Repair circuit and replace relay and/or fuse.

ps.ptxt: Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .
Refer to Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits .
